name: Fridge
description: This family of four has recently secured their rental flat after spending two years in transitional shelter, marking an important step toward stability and rebuilding their lives. As they settle into their new home, they are in urgent need of essential household appliances, including a refrigerator. The mother, who is the sole breadwinner earning slightly over $2,000 a month, is doing her best to provide for her children, but her income is stretched across daily expenses, school needs, and household bills. A refrigerator is vital for safe food storage, meal preparation, and reducing daily food costs, allowing the family to buy groceries in bulk and minimise food wastage. A donated fridge would significantly ease their financial strain and support their transition into a stable and dignified living environment.

name: Fridge
description: A family of three requires a working fridge. The family has attempted to repair their current fridge several times, but it can no longer be salvaged. Without a working fridge, the family is unable to store food that requires refrigeration, resulting in food spoilage. The family is facing financial constraints and is currently in the midst of searching for stable employment. The family has a school-going child.

name: Fridge
description: Family has 1 special needs child and 1 newborn. Father recently lost his job unexpectedly. Fridge has been broken for about 2 weeks, resulting in food being spoilt and family having to depend on dry rations.

contact.name: Katherine Ofiaza

name: Fridge
description: Client is functioning as a single father to 2 young children, one with suspected special needs. If you have a suitable item, please WhatsApp us at 6843 9619 thank you!

name: Mattress
description:
Request for Super Single Firm Mattress (Donation)

Seeking donation of a super single firm mattress for a low‑income senior staying with her spouse in a studio rental flat. Her current foam mattress has sunk and causes her to slide during sleep. She requires a firmer mattress for better support and safety.

Bedframe is super single size. Senior uses a walking frame when getting off the bed.

Any donation in good condition is greatly appreciated. Thank you for your kindness

name: Bicycle
description:
Sunbeam Place @ Children’s Society is requesting 2 medium-sized bicycles suitable for children aged 10 years and above.
These bicycles will be used to teach residents how to ride and for their general use.

Delivery will need to be arranged by the kind donor.
If you wish to contribute, please click “Donate”, and we will get in touch with you soon.

We sincerely thank you for your kindness and generosity in advance.
